codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly satisfies all feature requirements. Dependency pinning is complete across all workspace packages. Test DB isolation is properly set up in vitest globalSetup. Both the SEED_PASSWORD guard and NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL guard are correctly implemented.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The infra-worker skill procedure strictly mandates TDD (writing tests first). The worker noted this procedure doesn't fit infrastructure changes well (like dependency pinning or env guards), where verification relies on integration commands rather than unit tests.
Prisma 7 db push does not support the --skip-generate flag and uses --url to override the datasource. The worker discovered and fixed this in init.sh.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues and commit diff for .factory/init.sh

summary: Review passed. The worker correctly implemented dependency pinning, test DB isolation, and environment guards for seed and API URL.
